description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. In the deploy stage add a pages job that uses the python:3.7 Docker image, runs only on the master branch, executes pip install -e .[docs] then ./setup.py build_sphinx, creates a public directory, moves the generated Sphinx HTML from build/sphinx/html/* into public/, and publishes the public/ folder as an artifact. In the test stage add four jobs named python 3.4, python 3.5, python 3.6, and python 3.7, each using the matching python:<version> image and running the commands python --version, ./setup.py install, and ./setup.py test -v. No caches, services, or additional variables are defined.
